top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran reach deal to end the Mideast war, with agreement set to be signed Friday
top_signals.summary: The deal follows weeks of mixed messaging from both Washington and Tehran on the trajectory of the conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hedge Funds Reopen Pre-War Playbook as Iran Risks Ease
top_signals.summary: An eclectic mix of shorter-maturity Treasuries, beaten-up Asian currencies and even instant-noodle stocks look set to be among the early beneficiaries of the US-Iran agreement, according to global hedge fund managers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. crude drops nearly 5% as Washington-Tehran deal is set to open Hormuz Strait
top_signals.summary: "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," Trump said in a Truth Social post.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UniCredit Asks BaFin to Review Commerzbank Statements Over Bid
top_signals.summary: UniCredit SpA asked Germany’s BaFin to investigate statements by Commerzbank AG that it says have undermined its takeover offer, further ratcheting up tensions between the two banks.
